name: GIGABYTE B850 AI TOP ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x2 - Support DDR5-8600(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C (DP Alt mode) - HDMI 2.1 - Dual 10GbE LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4
shortName: GIGABYTE B850 AI TOP ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 5.0 x16
description: Full-size ATX AM5 motherboard with dual PCIe 5.0 x16, DDR5-8600 support, and Wi-Fi 7 for high-end AM5 systems.
